units.content: Text can be converted into coupling map entries through a transduction pipeline
Text-to-number conversion is a domain-specific measurement pipeline analogous to AlphaFold or CXR evaluation
Two independent measurement channels exist: predicate frequency extraction and embedding distance
Channel convergence indicates structural validation
Channel divergence indicates a diagnostic crack
Human is the instrument, LLM/embedding model is the transducer, conceptual space is the target, float is the measurement
The ontology problem is not solved but measured
Sensory verbs include: see, hear, feel, touch, smell, taste, observe, notice, perceive, sense, detect, witness, watch, listen
Cognitive verbs include: think, know, believe, want, expect, assume, conclude, infer, predict, theorize, hypothesize, judge, evaluate, decide, hope, fear, interpret, understand, suppose, guess
Predicate type classification determines whether an expression is sensory or cognitive
PredicateExtraction data structure contains verb, predicate type, content, intensity, and reference fields
DescriptionEntry data structure contains text, who, context, extractions, embedding, and other metadata
Sensory predicates from entities with bodies are classified as measurements
Sensory predicates from bodyless entities are rejected or classified as predictions
All cognitive predicates are classified as predictions
Predicate frequency is computed as the proportion of entries containing a pattern
Mean intensity is computed from aggregated predicate intensities
Embedding coherence is computed as mean cosine similarity to centroid
Embedding spread is computed as standard deviation of centroid similarities
Principal component analysis extracts top k embedding components via power iteration
Cross-group distance is measured as cosine similarity between group centroid embeddings
Distribution mean, standard deviation, and skewness are computed from value samples
Number of modes is detected by threshold checking (bimodal if outliers >15% on both sides)
Standard deviation represents ontological load of a concept
Multiple modes signal speciation rather than noise
